name: ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under ICICI Bank reward programme terms
milestoneBenefits: Up to 20,000 reward points every anniversary year under ICICI Bank milestone rewards
additionalBenefits: Welcome vouchers worth Rs 9,000+ listed on ICICI Bank card catalogue
Buy one movie or event ticket and get up to Rs 500 off on the second ticket twice every month on BookMyShow
2 complimentary international airport lounge visits per year
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter subject to spend criteria
Up to 4 complimentary golf rounds every month based on eligible spends

salaried: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank approval criteria
